title: SkillPipeline
description: An ordered sequence of SkillSteps produced by agent-runtime decomposer. Represents the cerebellar inverse model output: a concrete execution plan for achieving a goal. Passed from agent-runtime to motor-output.

goal_id.description: The ExecutiveGoal this pipeline was generated to fulfil.

workflow_id.description: Temporal Workflow or Prefect flow ID running this pipeline.

steps.description: Ordered list of SkillSteps. Steps with the same parallel_group may execute concurrently (SMA analogue).

decomposition_model.description: LiteLLM model string used to generate this decomposition, e.g. 'ollama/mistral'.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when this pipeline was created.

SkillStep.description: A single parameterised skill invocation within a pipeline.

step_id.description: Unique step identifier within this pipeline (e.g. '1', '2a', UUID).

tool_id.description: Registered tool or skill identifier from the agent-runtime tool registry.

params.description: Input parameters for the tool invocation. Schema is tool-specific.

expected_output.description: Declarative description of the expected output structure (corollary discharge forward model).

depends_on.description: List of step_ids that must complete before this step executes.

parallel_group.description: Steps sharing the same parallel_group may be dispatched concurrently (SMA parallel sequences analogue).

channel.description: Channel hint passed to motor-output dispatcher.

timeout_seconds.description: Maximum seconds allowed for this step before the error policy is invoked.

status.description: Runtime execution status of this step.
